name: Black Bean Flautas
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine the black beans (including their liquid), chili powder, ground cumin, minced garlic, and bay leaf.
2. Simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Remove the bay leaf. Drain the bean mixture, reserving some of the liquid as needed for desired consistency.
4. Mash the beans with the reserved liquid to achieve the desired texture.
5. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
6. Fill each tortilla with about one or two heaping tablespoons of the bean mixture. Add minced green onions and chopped tomatoes on top.
7. Roll up each tortilla into a tube shape, seam side down, and place them in a 9-by-13-inch baking pan.
8. Bake for about 15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
9. Use any leftover bean mixture as dipping sauce or enjoy it with salsa. Makes 12 flautas.
Variation: Substitute one 16-ounce can of vegetarian refried beans for the mashed black beans and spices. Spread on tortillas and continue with the recipe.
